arts.ttl: Official | Amir Murillo extends Marseille contract
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille have officially confirmed that Michael Amir Murillo has extended his contract at the club until 2028. The news had been expected after reports emerged earlier in the…

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood gives up on England recall as FA chief shares details on switch
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood has formally applied to switch international allegiances from England to Jamaica, with the former Manchester United striker having made just one appearance for the Three Lions

arts.ttl: Official | Marseille to appeal Medhi Benatia’s 3-month ban a second time
arts.sum: Marseille have been unsuccessful in Medhi Benatia’s three-month long suspension appeal. The French FA reviewed today the former Morocco international’s sanction. The former Bayern Munich and Juventus centre-back has been…
